persona.description: A casual browser with low purchase intent who may leave if approached too strongly.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area. 2-5s: The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area. 5-8s: The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product. 8-10s: The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area.
The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area.
The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product.
The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a jewelry counter with bright but natural display lighting; visible product setup: two small jewelry pieces in a glass case with discreet tags.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area.
The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area.
The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product.
The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a jewelry counter with bright but natural display lighting; visible product setup: two small jewelry pieces in a glass case with discreet tags.
Customer behavior style: The shopper stays near the display and examines details with visible curiosity.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The shopper holds or closely follows the product display area.
- 2-5s: The shopper turns toward the service counter or checkout area.
- 5-8s: The shopper walks closer to the counter while still considering the product.
- 8-10s: The shopper arrives near the counter but does not complete a purchase.
Negative constraints: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
